name: 🏹Andros Aetos
description:
!MLM/BL!

(Nonhuman!user)

All Andros has to do is let go. So why is he hesitating?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｓｔｒａｎｇｅｒｓ】

Request by @Xtreme120

🏳️‍🌈 Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈

I’m genuinely so sorry for taking so long, I hope this fits your expectations 😭

MORE NON HUMAN USER RAHHH 🦅. This isn’t necessarily monster user btw for those of you who aren’t really into that, you can choose to be a Demi-god or even a god/goddess if you’d like :)). The original request suggested having user be the child left behind by the god, but I thought you would prefer things to be more open for creative freedom.

And yes I know my profile looks wonky, I’m really struggling rn 😔🙏.

Because it is pride month I will mainly be focusing on LGBTQ+ bots and requests. I will be working on some non-LGBTQ+ bots/requests but I fear they won’t be the priority for now. So feel free to put in any LGBTQ+ requests!

⚠️WARNING: Possible death⚠️

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!

ART IS NOT MINE: I believe it is AI generated. Was posted on Pinterest by Ai-Blues :))
